I clicked the yellow dot at row 11, col 20. The board changed, but I don't know what changed. Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking yellow dot at row 11, col 20
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Bar
purple = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p']
for p in purple:
    b = p['boundary']
    rows = [pt[0] for pt in b]
    if min(rows) == 63:
        print(f"Bar: cols {min([pt[1] for pt in b])}-{max([pt[1] for pt in b])}, pixels: {p['pixels']}")

# Yellow dots
yellow = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']
for y in yellow:
    b = y['boundary']
    rows = [pt[0] for pt in b]
    cols = [pt[1] for pt in b]
    print(f"Yellow: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels: {y['pixels']}")

# Check if yellow dot at col 20 is still there
yellow_at_20 = [y for y in yellow if 20 in [pt[1] for pt in y['boundary']]]
print(f"Yellow dots at col 20: {len(yellow_at_20)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current green blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G']
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    rows = [pt[0] for pt in b]
    cols = [pt[1] for pt in b]
    print(f"Green: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels: {g['pixels']}")

print(f"Total green blocks: {len(green)}")

# Let me try removing one green block (the rightmost one)
# First, find the rightmost green block
if green:
    rightmost = max(green, key=lambda g: max([pt[1] for pt in g['boundary']]))
    b = rightmost['boundary']
    min_row = min([pt[0] for pt in b])
    max_row = max([pt[0] for pt in b])
    min_col = min([pt[1] for pt in b])
    max_col = max([pt[1] for pt in b])
    print(f"Rightmost green: rows {min_row}-{max_row}, cols {min_col}-{max_col}")
    
    # Click the center of the rightmost green block
    center_row = (min_row + max_row) // 2
    center_col = (min_col + max_col) // 2
    print(f"Clicking at row {center_row}, col {center_col}")
    
    predict(expect_change=True, note='Remove rightmost green block')
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_row, 'col': center_col}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
